name: mouse-pixelation
title: Mouse Pixelation
description: Three R3F WebGL mouse-reactive pixelation effects behind a version-switcher header. V1: GLSL pixel-circle shader with animated orbiting circles and GSAP scroll pin. V2: image texture with velocity-driven block displacement. V3: extruded pixel trail grid paired with a deforming bloom-lit cube that auto-cycles neon colors.
